change: Terminal-progress library scans and sequential loss-safe backup processing
reliabilityChanges: History and Ask expose completed/total meeting progress and have a five-minute absolute library-scan deadline.
Whole-library hydration, legacy migration, and backup restore read and archive one transcript at a time.
Verified backup/restore bodies are released from React memory; an archive failure retains the complete inline body.
Backup export/import expose stage progress, Cancel, a 15-minute job boundary, and immediate loss-safe Retry.

focusedCoverage: 500-meeting scan progress and maximum one active archive read
absolute library scan deadline with no false terminal progress
200-meeting sequential restore with injected middle archive failure retaining complete inline text
complete Markdown and final-page PDF markers

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 devicectl lists the paired iPhone 14 Pro and iPad as unavailable; the previous signed destination attempt could not mount a developer disk image for the iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build, unit, high-cardinality storage, and rendered browser proof do not prove locked physical 60/120-minute capture, native saved-audio transcription, interruption or memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
